remarks: Now offering 1 MONTH FREE with a one-year lease a significant savings opportunity on an already exceptional value. Rarely does an in-town rental of this size and floor plan become available. This expansive 2360 sq ft end-unit duplex occupies the 3rd and 4th floors at The Wilton Center Lofts, offering a unique opportunity for modern, elevated living with private decks on both levels. Excellent commuter location-just a seven-minute walk to the Metro-North train and a three-minute drive. This home is architecturally and interior designed by the award-winning Granoff Architects, featuring top-tier finishes and timeless design throughout. The apartment boasts 9-foot ceilings and large, light-filled windows, creating a bright and open atmosphere. The gourmet kitchen includes quartz countertops, stainless steel BOSCH appliances, custom cabinetry, and premium fixtures. Wood-grain flooring flows throughout, complementing luxurious bathrooms, while large walk-in closets, an in-unit washer and dryer, providing everyday comfort and convenience. Residents enjoy access to a fitness center, tenant lounge, covered parking, and available storage units, further enhancing the lifestyle experience. Furry friends are welcome. This exceptional duplex delivers modern luxury, and intelligent design.
